$comment: Polish — the four-form Slavic plural (one/few/many) that proves the CLDR-lite rule set is genuinely multi-category. 1 -> one (plik); 2,3,4,22,23,24 -> few (pliki); 0,5..21,25.. -> many (plików).

app.title: Galeria FluentGpu
app.subtitle: Nowoczesny silnik lokalizacji oparty na JSON

player.songs: {count, plural, =0 {Brak utworów} one {# utwór} few {# utwory} many {# utworów} other {# utworu}}
player.songsBy: {count, plural, =0 {Brak utworów od {artist}} one {# utwór od {artist}} few {# utwory od {artist}} many {# utworów od {artist}} other {# utworu od {artist}}}

files.$comment: The headline Polish plural demo: pliki/plików form selection driven by the count.
files.count: {count, plural, =0 {Brak plików} one {# plik} few {# pliki} many {# plików} other {# pliku}}
